# FSharp.Grpc

> F# code generator for Protocol Buffers. Generates F# records, enums, discriminated unions, binary/JSON serialization, and gRPC server/client stubs from `.proto` files. Single NuGet package: `FSharp.Grpc.Tools.Codegen`. No runtime library — generated code depends only on `Google.Protobuf` and `Grpc.Core.Api`.

## Docs

- [Messages](https://github.com/excpt/dotnet-fsharp-grpc/blob/main/docs/messages.md): Setup, type mapping, JSON, examples
- [gRPC Server](https://github.com/excpt/dotnet-fsharp-grpc/blob/main/docs/grpc-server.md): Setup, handler signatures, all streaming patterns, testing
- [gRPC Client](https://github.com/excpt/dotnet-fsharp-grpc/blob/main/docs/grpc-client.md): Setup, client creation, all streaming patterns
- [Full documentation for LLMs](https://github.com/excpt/dotnet-fsharp-grpc/blob/main/llms-full.txt): Complete reference in a single file

## Quick start

```bash
dotnet new console -lang F# -n MyApp && cd MyApp
dotnet add package FSharp.Grpc.Tools.Codegen
```

Add `<Protobuf Include="protos/*.proto"/>` to your `.fsproj`, then `dotnet build`.

## Type mapping

| Proto | F# |
|---|---|
| Scalar fields | Record fields |
| `message` fields | `TypeName option` |
| `optional` scalars | `scalar option` |
| `repeated` fields | `type list` |
| `map<K, V>` | `Map<K, V>` |
| `enum` | F# enum + companion module |
| `oneof` | Discriminated union `option` |
| Well-known types | `Google.Protobuf.WellKnownTypes` |

## Generated API per message

| Function | Signature |
|---|---|
| `empty` | `T` |
| `encode` / `decode` | `T -> byte array` / `byte array -> T` |
| `encodeJson` / `decodeJson` | `T -> string` / `string -> T` |
| `computeSize` | `T -> int` |
| `writeTo` / `decodeFrom` | `CodedOutputStream -> T -> unit` / `CodedInputStream -> T` |

## gRPC

Set `GrpcServices="Server"`, `"Client"`, or `"Both"` on `<Protobuf>` items.

**Server**: Handler record + service class registered via `MapGrpcService<T>()`.
**Client**: Client record + `create`/`fromChannel`/`fromInvoker` factory functions.

All 4 patterns supported: unary, server streaming, client streaming, bidirectional.

## Requirements

- .NET 8.0+
- Proto3 only
